text_block_list.name: Rental Shop Manager
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Ines! Can I ask you to help out on the first
floor?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You got it! The magazine section, right? I saw the
delivery come in not long ago.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoa...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ayooo! If it isn't Ines! ☆ Just finished work?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Gack?! Helios?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I see what ya got there! Being featured in
that article is wild, Ines, no cap!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
They're calling you the front-runner for the
Satsuki Sho! That's so lit! Like super hype!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, quit it with that stuff.
Hey, it's pretty dark—wanna walk back together?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Say less, bestie!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... "Exclusive Street Survey! The Umamusume
to Watch at the Satsuki Sho!"

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Let's see why people chose me... "I watched her in
the Asahi Hai," "She looks like my older sister."
Hm, what else...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: "Because I wanted to see my dream in her."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Why would someone see their dream in me?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any particular star qualities. I wonder
if something resonated with them? Or maybe it's
because I'm aiming for the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heh. A dream, huh?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Having the chance to compete in the Classic
Triple Crown tour is definitely a dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I really need to show gratitude to my family for
letting me chase my dreams like this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Brrring! Brrring!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hello? Cassie and Polly?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hehe, you've finished your dance lesson, huh?
I just got back to the academy myself.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
Ah... erm. Um, Big Sis.... Good luck in the Satsuki
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
Do your best to win! When it's time for the Derby,
we'll all be there to cheer you on in person!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
Me and Polly both love watching you race, Big
Sis!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And I love when you watch me! I cherish you two
more than anything in the world!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best to make you proud of your big sis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Satsuki Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be a G1 race just like the Asahi Hai F.S.,
but there are numerous differences.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The biggest difference is that it's the first leg of
the Classic Triple Crown. You have to win here to
have a chance at becoming Triple Crown
champion.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Anything I missed?
choice_data_list: There's a lot more attention on you now.
There's a lot more attention on you now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Haha, I think I'm already well aware of that.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I get the sense that a lot of people are expecting
great things from me. And I've got this fluttering
feeling in my stomach.
choice_data_list: Your rivals have their eyes on you, too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Rivals, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes, very few of
the other competitors considered Ines Fujin a
rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, this time around, she's most definitely
been marked. There are likely some Umamusume
who will stop at nothing to beat her.
choice_data_list: Be on your game from the start.
Be on your game from the start.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Right. I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No matter how intense this race gets, I'm
definitely going to win!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now, our eighteen racers make their way into
the paddock for the start of the Satsuki Sho—the
first battle of the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: The crowd is really going wild.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh—Ryan! So you're...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You look like you're all ready to go today! You
seem even more confident than usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Good eye! The 2,000-meter Nakayama
Racecourse is right up my alley.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's make this a good one, Ines. I'm going to run
with everything I've got and seize victory!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's great. But I have no intention of losing
either!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. This is race is going to be more than just a
little heated!
